ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
alsa_lib:
- '1.2'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'

about.summary: Provides seamless access to the 'QGIS' (<https://qgis.org/en/site/>) processing toolbox using the standalone 'qgis_process' command-line utility.  Both native and third-party (plugin) processing providers are supported.  Beside referring data sources from file, also common objects from 'sf', 'terra' and 'stars' are supported. The native processing algorithms are documented by QGIS.org (2023) <https://docs.qgis.org/latest/en/docs/user_manual/processing_algs/>.

Provides seamless access to the 'QGIS' (<https://qgis.org/en/site/>) processing toolbox using the standalone 'qgis_process' command-line utility.  Both native and third-party (plugin) processing providers are supported.  Beside referring data sources from file, also common objects from 'sf', 'terra' and 'stars' are supported. The native processing algorithms are documented by QGIS.org (2023) <https://docs.qgis.org/latest/en/docs/user_manual/processing_algs/>.

name: r-qgisprocess
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "0.4.2" %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-qgisprocess
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/qgisprocess_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/qgisprocess/qgisprocess_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 715f5f51c4e8554a6561141e34fc256918367442366e820198be8966492f4629

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-assertthat
    - r-glue
    - r-jsonlite
    - r-processx >=3.5.2
    - r-rappdirs
    - r-rlang
    - r-stringr
    - r-tibble
    - r-vctrs
    - r-withr
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-assertthat
    - r-glue
    - r-jsonlite
    - r-processx >=3.5.2
    - r-rappdirs
    - r-rlang
    - r-stringr
    - r-tibble
    - r-vctrs
    - r-withr
    - qgis >=3.28

test:
  requires:
    - r-testthat
    - r-raster
    - r-sf
    - r-stars
    - r-terra
    # Following CDTs are from `qgis` feedstock test section
    - xorg-xorgproto                     # [linux]
    - xorg-libx11                        # [linux]
    - xorg-libxext                       # [linux]
    - xorg-libxrender                    # [linux]
    - libgl-devel                        # [linux]
    - libegl-devel                       # [linux]
    - xorg-libxau                        # [linux]
    - alsa-lib                           # [linux]
    - gtk2                               # [linux]
    - libdrm                             # [linux]
    - xorg-libxcomposite                 # [linux]
    - xorg-libxcursor                    # [linux]
    - xorg-libxi                         # [linux]
    - xorg-libxrandr                      # [linux]
    - xorg-libxscrnsaver                 # [linux]
    - xorg-libxtst                       # [linux]
    - xorg-libxdamage                    # [linux]
    - xorg-libxfixes                     # [linux]
  source_files:
    - tests/
  commands:
    #- qgis_process --help
    - $R -e "library('qgisprocess')"                                         # [not win]
    # - $R -e "testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)"  # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('qgisprocess')\""                                         # [win]
    # - "\"%R%\" -e \"testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://r-spatial.github.io/qgisprocess/
  dev_url: https://github.com/r-spatial/qgisprocess
  license: GPL-3.0-or-later
  summary: Provides seamless access to the 'QGIS' (<https://qgis.org/en/site/>) processing toolbox using the standalone 'qgis_process' command-line utility.  Both native and third-party (plugin) processing providers are supported.  Beside referring data sources from file, also common objects from 'sf', 'terra' and 
    'stars' are supported. The native processing algorithms are documented by QGIS.org (2023) <https://docs.qgis.org/latest/en/docs/user_manual/processing_algs/>.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - thewchan
